log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Tiefling — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Tiefling — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Tiefling — Bardic Musician.
→ Tiefling — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 20] FAIL! 40 necrotic damage. HP: 27/67
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:20+9=29 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tiefling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 26 fire damage + .
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tiefling — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tiefling — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 22 fire damage + .
